label: Calendar
items: New Week view on the Schedule — toggle between Month and Week from the calendar header. Drag a task chip onto another day to reschedule it.
Export upcoming tasks to your phone or laptop calendar — tap Export to download an .ics file you can import into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook.

label: Task Schedules
items: Pause a recurring schedule for 1, 2, or 4 weeks — useful when you're away or a plant is dormant. Resume any time with a single tap.
When you set up a new recurring schedule, Rhozly now warns you if it duplicates an existing one in the same area.
Generate a task from a photo — snap your garden, and Rhozly AI suggests a task type, title, and how often to do it. You review and save.

label: Optimise
items: New 'Whole garden' mode — scan every area in one go to find duplicated or redundant schedules across the whole site.
